title: Middleware authorization bypass via App Router transport routes under Turbopack (incomplete fix of CVE-2026-44575)
description: This is the Turbopack-build follow-up to CVE-2026-44575 (GHSA-267c-6grr-h53f). The fix that added App Router transport variants to the middleware matcher in get-page-static-info.ts was not applied to the Turbopack code path, where the equivalent middleware-matcher regex is generated in Rust in crates/next-api/src/middleware.rs (MiddlewareEndpoint). That generator appended only the legacy `.json` data-route suffix (and root index forms), omitting the App Router `.rsc` and segment-prefetch `...segments/<seg>.segment.rsc` transport variants. Consequently, in Turbopack builds, crafted `.rsc`/segment-prefetch URLs that resolve to a protected page are not matched by the generated middleware matcher, so middleware-based authorization is skipped and protected content can be reached without the expected check.
